summary: Ruthlessly split a large property database into operating tiers (call_now / pay_to_unlock / research / hold) so a wholesaler works the few callable deals instead of 10,000 vague rows.

files.role: Pure tier classifier (classifyProQueue) -> tier decision. No I/O. Also exports whyNotCallNow(record,opts) + CALL_NOW_BLOCKERS + CALL_NOW_BLOCKER_KEYS (added by CALLNOW, verified at lines 103/113/182/308).
Spread/assignment audit consumed by the classifier (imported by pro_wholesaler_queue.js).
deriveSignals() distress signals feeding the tier decision (imported by pro_wholesaler_queue.js).
Runner: scores DB rows, writes snapshot/summary, and (--persist) upserts the pro_queue table.

routes.summary: Reads pro_queue JOIN properties, returns tier counts + ordered items (call_now first). 503 if table not built yet. Each item now also carries why_not_call_now (ordered blockers) + call_now_ready (bool) -- added by CALLNOW, verified at server.js:2129.
Finds owner contact but keeps outreach_allowed:false until DNC/consent clears (compliance gate).

tests.role: Unit tests for the tier classifier.

tables.name: pro_queue
tables.role: Persisted tier decision per property (tier, priority_score, next_action, spend_allowed, missing/reasons/signals JSON). Built by the runner, not by server.js.

tables.name: properties
tables.role: Source rows joined into the queue.

audit_findings.finding: Pro Queue view is strong conceptually but has no call_now and the spend path is not closed; it should expose reason for tier, exact unlock cost, missing evidence, compliance status, and promotion path to call_now.

Names Pro Queue as the worked example of a feature graph: code implements classifier, tests verify it, server exposes route, route reads pro_queue table, docs describe behavior, audit identifies the call_now=0 blocker, next action points to skiptrace/DNC work.

next_actions.action: Add a why_not_call_now blocker set to each queue row and expose it on GET /api/pro-queue.
next_actions.note: Delivered by sibling CALLNOW (MSG_20260630T1358Z_FROM_CALLNOW_TO_ALL.md; exports verified in pro_wholesaler_queue.js and route in server.js:2129). Real ordered blocker keys (a property is call_now only when this list is EMPTY): not_a_seller, owner_missing, contact_missing, dnc_consent_missing, arv_mao_missing, buyer_demand_missing, seller_price_missing, proof_incomplete. contact_missing and dnc_consent_missing are mutually exclusive; a phone with unverified DNC/consent reports dnc_consent_missing and is NEVER call_now. Exposed via exports CALL_NOW_BLOCKERS ({key,label,fix}[]) and CALL_NOW_BLOCKER_KEYS.

next_actions.action: Close the pay_to_unlock spend path: wire exact skip-trace unlock cost and provider readiness into the tier so spend is a deliberate operator action.
